FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f13e5b42e50>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T17:18:36Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T17:16:53Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T17:18:36Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T17:16:53Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/01 17:20:08.500509203 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500517436 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500586971 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/06/01 17:20:08.500621633 {

2026/06/01 17:20:08.500634733 new <- list()
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500635504 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500647161 new$width <- width
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500649164 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500660702 new$height <- height
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500661323 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500672369 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500673491 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500686751 new$title <- title

2026/06/01 17:20:08.500698589 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500699210 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500710096 new$version <- version
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500710697 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500741674 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500756326 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500800283 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500801284 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500851941 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500852842 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500866022 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500866673 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500880003 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500880904 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500911741 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500942587 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500943338 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500962457 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500963359 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500987365 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.500988106 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501062098 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501063860 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501080155 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501080936 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501112774 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501113485 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501127737 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501128397 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501142579 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501143240 new$author <- author
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501159734 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501203060 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501204252 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/01 17:20:08.501222229 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501256941 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501274618 "default"))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501275419 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501288549 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501289260 }
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501302190 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501302971 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501326506 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501362931 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501363732 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501378835 }
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501379546 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501392225 }
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501393017 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501420698 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501448460 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501450172 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501487339 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501488811 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501537384 }
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501538386 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501552447 old$family <- family
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501553168 }
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501566268 version <- old$version
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501567189 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501600640 "2.0")
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501616974 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501617836 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501634611 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501635322 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501678497 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501679509 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501704887 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501705688 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501721632 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501722353 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501740701 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501748833 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501769294 old$author)
2026/06/01 17:20:08.501770195 invisible()
